findings.title: Pipe to interpreter: curl | python3
findings.description:
Command pipes output from 'curl' directly to interpreter 'python3'. Downloaded content will be executed without inspection.
  Safer: tirith run https://api.github.com/rate_limit  — or: vet https://api.github.com/rate_limit  (https://getvet.sh)

evidence.matched: curl -s "https://api.github.com/rate_limit" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=[REDACTED]; print(json.dumps(d, indent=[REDACTED]
